title: Computers and their components
summary: 9618 — hardware components, buses, and system architecture overview.
learningObjectives: Describe roles of CPU, RAM, and storage.

simpleExplanation.title: Inside the computer
simpleExplanation.summary: A computer combines processor, memory, storage, and I/O connected by buses to execute programs.
steps: RAM holds running programs and data.

sections.content: **Computer components** (3.1) precedes **4.1 CPU architecture** in depth. Draw a **labelled block diagram**.
